title: Mortgage Bills Are Coming Again. $10 Billion in Aid May Arrive First.
content: The federal Homeowner Assistance Fund aims to help those still struggling as forbearance periods come to an end. But the assistance isn’t limited to mortgage payments.
en_title: Mortgage Bills Are Coming Again. $10 Billion in Aid May Arrive First.

title: How Americans’ Appetite for Leather in Luxury SUVs Worsens Amazon Deforestation
content: An examination of Brazil’s immense tannery industry shows how hides from illegally deforested ranches can easily reach the global marketplace. In the United States, much of the demand for Brazilian leather comes from automakers.

more_info.byline: By Manuela Andreoni, Hiroko Tabuchi, Albert Sun and Victor Moriyama

en_title: How Americans’ Appetite for Leather in Luxury SUVs Worsens Amazon Deforestation
en_content: An examination of Brazil’s immense tannery industry shows how hides from illegally deforested ranches can easily reach the global marketplace. In the United States, much of the demand for Brazilian leather comes from automakers.

title: CVS will close 900 stores as it looks beyond traditional pharmacies.

title: Miramax Sues Quentin Tarantino Over Planned ‘Pulp Fiction’ NFTs
content: The director announced this month that he was selling nonfungible tokens based on the screenplay for his 1994 movie. Miramax asserted in court documents it still has “broad rights” to the film.

title: Amazon, railing against high fees, will stop accepting Visa credit cards issued in Britain.
